name: gai-it.com
message: For over 70 years and three generations, Gai has established several milestones in the development of high quality bottling. At the same time, the product range has grown to include sparkling beverages, spirits and oily liquids. Thus, in addition to wines and beers, now even in cans. Today, Gai machines are running worldwide, in all types of bottling and labelling operations, with specialized technical assistance and lifetime spare parts.SITE: www.gai-it.com Address : 33 & B Fraz. Cappelli, Ceresole Alba, Piedmont, 12040, ItalyALL DATA SIZE: ≈750gb 1. Company data 2. Home users data: Employees personal documents 3. Projects & etc…
